env.v1_015.circadian_timing_of_exposure.definition: Morning light most impactful for entrainment

env.v2a_001.color_palette_hue_saturation.definition: Color palette hue/saturation/lightness harmony (beyond CCT); red/blue dominance (Mehta & Zhu, 2009).

env.v2a_002.warm_vs_cool_white_appearanc.canonical_name: Warm vs cool white appearance (CCT) and perceived coziness/activation (Cajochen et al., 2005
env.v2a_002.warm_vs_cool_white_appearanc.definition: Warm vs cool white appearance (CCT) and perceived coziness/activation (Cajochen et al., 2005; Chellappa et al., 2011).

env.v2a_003.brightness_level_at_eye_vert.canonical_name: Brightness level at eye (vertical illuminance) vs task plane
env.v2a_003.brightness_level_at_eye_vert.definition: Brightness level at eye (vertical illuminance) vs task plane; perceived ‘dimness’ vs ‘glare’ zones.

env.v2a_004.brightness_gradients_and_bri.canonical_name: Brightness gradients and brightness contrast ratios
env.v2a_004.brightness_gradients_and_bri.definition: Brightness gradients and brightness contrast ratios (accent lighting vs uniform lighting).

env.v2a_005.daylight_presence_sky_view_a.canonical_name: Daylight presence, sky view, and view-to-outside content
env.v2a_005.daylight_presence_sky_view_a.definition: Daylight presence, sky view, and view-to-outside content (nature/urban).

env.v2a_006.glare_source_count.definition: Glare source count (direct & reflected) and discomfort glare probability proxies.

env.v2a_007.flicker_temporal_modulation_.definition: Flicker/temporal modulation risk cues (LED drivers; visible strobing in videos).

env.v2a_008.color_rendering_saturation_r.definition: Color rendering / saturation rendering (skin-tone naturalness) cues.

env.v2a_009.shadow_softness_hardness.definition: Shadow softness/hardness (diffuse vs directional) as comfort/threat cues.

env.v2a_010.lighting_control_cues_dimmer.canonical_name: Lighting control cues: dimmers, blinds, task lights
env.v2a_010.lighting_control_cues_dimmer.definition: Lighting control cues: dimmers, blinds, task lights (autonomy).

env.v2a_011.evening_like_ambience_cues_v.canonical_name: Evening-like ambience cues vs daytime-like ambience cues
env.v2a_011.evening_like_ambience_cues_v.definition: Evening-like ambience cues vs daytime-like ambience cues (circadian appropriateness).

env.v2a_012.visual_privacy_via_lighting_.canonical_name: Visual privacy via lighting: backlit silhouettes vs evenly lit faces
env.v2a_012.visual_privacy_via_lighting_.definition: Visual privacy via lighting: backlit silhouettes vs evenly lit faces (social comfort).

env.v2a_013.high_contrast_spotlight_soci.definition: High contrast ‘spotlight’ social exposure cues (stage-like lighting).

env.v2a_014.presence_of_natural_light_pa.definition: Presence of natural light patterns (dappled light, sun patches) (thermal/affective associations).

env.v2a_015.lighting_temperature_mismatc.definition: Lighting ‘temperature mismatch’ (e.g., very cool lighting in ‘relax’ contexts) as appraisal mismatch.

env.v2a_067.ceiling_height_and_openness_.definition: Ceiling height and openness (processing style; freedom/constraint primes) (Meyers-Levy & Zhu, 2007).

env.v2a_068.room_scale_cues.definition: Room scale cues (human scale vs monumental) and awe/insignificance appraisal.

env.v2a_069.enclosure_ratio_wall_to_wind.definition: Enclosure ratio: wall-to-window balance; perceived refuge vs exposure.

env.v2a_070.prospect_refuge_ability_to_s.canonical_name: Prospect–refuge: ability to see without being seen
env.v2a_070.prospect_refuge_ability_to_s.definition: Prospect–refuge: ability to see without being seen; corner refuge availability.

env.v2a_071.exit_visibility_and_path_to_.definition: Exit visibility and path-to-exit complexity (safety appraisal).

env.v2a_072.blind_corners_vs_transparent.definition: Blind corners vs transparent partitions; concealment opportunities.

env.v2a_073.distance_to_others.definition: Distance to others (proxemic space) and crowding stress risk (Evans & Wener, 2007).

env.v2a_074.wayfinding_legibility_straig.definition: Wayfinding legibility: straight sightlines, landmarks, signage, decision-point density.

env.v2a_075.spatial_complexity_branching.canonical_name: Spatial complexity: branching corridors vs simple loops
env.v2a_075.spatial_complexity_branching.definition: Spatial complexity: branching corridors vs simple loops (cognitive load).

env.v2a_076.perceived_territoriality_def.canonical_name: Perceived territoriality: defined zones vs ambiguous shared space.
env.v2a_076.perceived_territoriality_def.definition: Perceived territoriality: defined zones vs ambiguous shared space.

env.v2a_077.barrier_permeability_half_wa.canonical_name: Barrier permeability: half-walls vs full walls
env.v2a_077.barrier_permeability_half_wa.definition: Barrier permeability: half-walls vs full walls; social exposure control.

env.v2a_078.visual_access_to_outdoors_na.canonical_name: Visual access to outdoors/nature as ‘escape’ affordance.
env.v2a_078.visual_access_to_outdoors_na.definition: Visual access to outdoors/nature as ‘escape’ affordance.

env.v2a_079.seating_prospect_facing_entr.canonical_name: Seating prospect: facing entrance vs back to entrance
env.v2a_079.seating_prospect_facing_entr.definition: Seating prospect: facing entrance vs back to entrance (threat monitoring).

env.v2a_081.personal_safety_affordances_.canonical_name: Personal safety affordances: lighting in corners
env.v2a_081.personal_safety_affordances_.definition: Personal safety affordances: lighting in corners, absence of hiding places.

env.v2a_082.curvature_prevalence_vs_shar.definition: Curvature prevalence vs sharp angles (threat/comfort bias) (Bar & Neta, 2006).

env.v2a_084.fractal_self_similar_edge_st.definition: Fractal/self-similar edge statistics (nature-like ranges) (Hägerhäll et al., 2004).

env.v2a_085.clutter_disorder_object_dens.canonical_name: Clutter/disorder: object density, occlusion, surface coverage
env.v2a_085.clutter_disorder_object_dens.definition: Clutter/disorder: object density, occlusion, surface coverage (stress/control).

env.v2a_087.color_diversity_and_saturati.definition: Color diversity and saturation; visual ‘loudness’ as arousal potential.

env.v2a_088.texture_density.definition: Texture density (busy patterns) vs minimalism (calmness in some contexts).

env.v2a_089.artwork_density_and_semantic.definition: Artwork density and semantic content (threatening vs soothing imagery).

env.v2a_090.naturalness_of_materials.definition: Naturalness of materials (wood grain) vs synthetic visual noise.

env.v2a_091.visual_complexity_gradients.definition: Visual complexity gradients (quiet corners vs busy hubs).

env.v2a_092.signage_density_informationa.definition: Signage density (informational load; can reduce uncertainty or increase clutter).

env.v2a_093.visual_affordances_for_organ.definition: Visual affordances for organization (storage visibility) reducing disorder.

env.v2a_094.orderliness_of_lines_alignme.definition: Orderliness of lines: alignment, grid structure, repetition.

env.v2a_095.perceptual_mystery_cues.definition: Perceptual ‘mystery’ cues (partial occlusion inviting exploration) (ART literature).

env.v2a_096.visible_vegetation_quantity_.canonical_name: Visible vegetation quantity, proximity, and distribution
env.v2a_096.visible_vegetation_quantity_.definition: Visible vegetation quantity, proximity, and distribution (Kaplan, 1995).

env.v2a_097.window_view_content_greenery.canonical_name: Window view content: greenery, sky, water vs built-up
env.v2a_097.window_view_content_greenery.definition: Window view content: greenery, sky, water vs built-up (Ulrich, 1984).

env.v2a_098.natural_materials_wood_stone.definition: Natural materials: wood/stone; biomorphic forms; nature images.

env.v2a_100.prospect_to_distant_views.definition: Prospect to distant views (horizon) vs close enclosure.

env.v2a_101.natural_ventilation_cues.definition: Natural ventilation cues (breeze, operable windows) as ‘nature contact’.

env.v2a_102.natural_sound_sources.definition: Natural sound sources (water fountain) as restorative cue.

env.v2a_104.seasonal_cues.definition: Seasonal cues (flowers, fall colors) and mood associations.

env.v2a_105.animal_presence_cues.definition: Animal presence cues (fish tanks) and soothing engagement.

env.v2a_106.sociopetal_seating.definition: Sociopetal seating (faces toward) vs sociofugal (faces away) arrangements.

env.v2a_107.density_crowding_proxies_cha.canonical_name: Density/crowding proxies: chairs per area, people present, queueing lines
env.v2a_107.density_crowding_proxies_cha.definition: Density/crowding proxies: chairs per area, people present, queueing lines (Evans & Wener, 2007).

env.v2a_108.surveillance_cues_cameras_ex.canonical_name: Surveillance cues: cameras, exposed workstations, panoramic visibility
env.v2a_108.surveillance_cues_cameras_ex.definition: Surveillance cues: cameras, exposed workstations, panoramic visibility (social evaluative stress).

env.v2a_109.privacy_cues_partitions_door.definition: Privacy cues: partitions, doors, curtains; acoustic barriers.

env.v2a_110.territoriality_markers_name_.definition: Territoriality markers: name plates, personal objects, assigned desks.

env.v2a_111.norm_cues_formal_vs_informal.definition: Norm cues: formal vs informal (dress code signs, etiquette cues) affecting anxiety.

env.v2a_112.shared_resource_competition_.definition: Shared-resource competition cues (few outlets, few seats) affecting stress.

env.v2a_113.social_mixing_affordances.definition: Social mixing affordances (common tables) vs isolation affordances (booths).

env.v2a_114.conflict_overhearing_risk_cu.definition: Conflict/overhearing risk cues (tight spacing) affecting willingness to speak.

env.v2a_116.user_controls_visible_and_ac.canonical_name: User controls visible and accessible: dimmers, blinds, thermostats
env.v2a_116.user_controls_visible_and_ac.definition: User controls visible and accessible: dimmers, blinds, thermostats (Lee & Brand, 2010).

env.v2a_117.furniture_adjustability_mova.definition: Furniture adjustability: movable chairs/tables, reconfigurable partitions.

env.v2a_118.choice_richness_multiple_zon.definition: Choice richness: multiple zones (quiet/social/active) enabling self-selection.

env.v2a_119.personalization_affordances_.definition: Personalization affordances: pinboards, shelves, plant allowance.

env.v2a_120.policy_cues_restricting_cont.definition: Policy cues restricting control (signs forbidding moving furniture).

env.v2a_121.control_over_privacy_doors.definition: Control over privacy: doors, curtains, screens.

env.v2a_122.control_over_sound_headsets.definition: Control over sound: headsets, phone booths, white noise.

env.v2a_123.control_over_thermal_fans.definition: Control over thermal: fans, heaters, seat locations relative to windows.

env.v2a_124.control_over_lighting_task_l.definition: Control over lighting: task lamps, individual switches.

env.v2a_125.information_control_clear_wa.canonical_name: Information control: clear wayfinding reduces uncertainty.
env.v2a_125.information_control_clear_wa.definition: Information control: clear wayfinding reduces uncertainty.
